expression: /*#Radarr*/ /*UHD Bluray T1*/ queryType=='movie' ? regexMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'Radarr UHD Bluray T1') : []
/*#Radarr*/ /*HD Bluray T1*/ queryType=='movie' ? regexMatched(negate(resolution(streams, '2160p'), streams), 'Radarr HD Bluray T1') : []
/*#Radarr*/ /*UHD Bluray T2*/ queryType=='movie' ? regexMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'Radarr UHD Bluray T2') : []
/*#Radarr*/ /*HD Bluray T2*/ queryType=='movie' ? regexMatched(negate(resolution(streams, '2160p'), streams), 'Radarr HD Bluray T2') : []
/*#Radarr*/ /*UHD Bluray T3*/ queryType=='movie' ? regexMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'Radarr UHD Bluray T3') : []
/*#Radarr*/ /*HD Bluray T3*/ queryType=='movie' ? regexMatched(negate(resolution(streams, '2160p'), streams), 'Radarr HD Bluray T3') : []
/*#Radarr*/ /*Web T1*/ queryType=='movie' ? regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Web T1','Web T1') : []
/*#Sonarr*/ /*HD Bluray T1*/ queryType=='series' ? regexMatched(negate(resolution(streams, '2160p'), streams), 'Sonarr HD Bluray T1') : []
/*#Sonarr*/ /*HD Bluray T2*/ queryType=='series' ? regexMatched(negate(resolution(streams, '2160p'), streams), 'Sonarr HD Bluray T2') : []
/*#Sonarr*/ /*Web T1*/ queryType=='series' ? regexMatched(streams,'Sonarr Web T1','Web T1') : []
/*#Anime*/ /*BD T1*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime BD T1')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*BD T2*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime BD T2')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*BD T3*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime BD T3')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*BD T4*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime BD T4')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*BD T5*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime BD T5')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*BD T6*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime BD T6')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*BD T7*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime BD T7')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*BD T8*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime BD T8')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*#Radarr*/ /*Remux T1*/ queryType=='anime.movie' ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T1')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*#Radarr*/ /*Remux T2*/ queryType=='anime.movie' ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T2')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*#Radarr*/ /*Remux T3*/ queryType=='anime.movie' ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T3')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*#Sonarr*/ /*Remux T1*/ queryType=='anime.series' ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Sonarr Remux T1')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*#Sonarr*/ /*Remux T2*/ queryType=='anime.series' ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Sonarr Remux T2')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*Web T1*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime Web T1')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*Web T2*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime Web T2')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*Web T3*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime Web T3')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*Web T4*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime Web T4')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*Web T5*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime Web T5')) : []
/*#Anime*/ /*Web T6*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams,'Anime Web T6')) : []

/*#Groups*//* Choice */ negate(regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T1','Radarr Remux T2','Radarr Remux T3','Radarr UHD Bluray T1','Radarr UHD Bluray T2','Radarr UHD Bluray T3','Radarr HD Bluray T1','Radarr HD Bluray T2','Radarr HD Bluray T3','Radarr Web T1','Web T1','Radarr Web T2','Radarr Web T3','Sonarr Remux T1','Sonarr Remux T2','Sonarr HD Bluray T1','Sonarr HD Bluray T2','Sonarr Web T1','Sonarr Web T2','Sonarr Web T3','Web Scene','Anime BD T1','Anime BD T2','Anime BD T3','Anime BD T4','Anime BD T5','Anime BD T6','Anime BD T7','Anime BD T8','LQ (Radarr)','LQ (Release Title) (Radarr)','LQ (Sonarr)','LQ (Release Title) (Sonarr)','Anime LQ Groups'), releaseGroup(streams, 'MainFrame', '126811', 'FLUX', 'SiC', 'FraMeSToR', 'TheFarm', 'hallowed', 'BHDStudio', 'HONE', 'AMIABLE'))

/*#Radarr*/ /* Choice */ queryType=='movie' ? resolution(regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T1','Radarr Remux T2','Radarr Remux T3','Radarr UHD Bluray T1','Radarr UHD Bluray T2','Radarr UHD Bluray T3','Radarr HD Bluray T1','Radarr HD Bluray T2','Radarr HD Bluray T3','Radarr Web T1','Web T1','Radarr Web T2','Radarr Web T3'), '1080p', '2160p') : []

/*#Radarr*/ /* Retail */ queryType=='movie' ? negate(regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Web T1','Radarr Web T2','Radarr Web T3','Web T1','LQ (Radarr)','LQ (Release Title) (Radarr)','Webx265', 'Webx264'), resolution(quality(regexMatched(streams, 'ABEMA', 'ADN', 'AMZN', 'ATV', 'ATVP', 'BCORE', 'CR', 'DSNP', 'FUNi', 'HBO', 'HMAX', 'iT', 'MAX', 'Hulu', 'PLAY', 'MA', 'NF', 'PMTP', 'PCOK', 'SHO', 'SYFY', 'VRV'), 'WEB-DL'), '1080p', '2160p')) : []

/*#Radarr*/ /* MID */ queryType=='movie' ? negate(regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T1','Radarr Remux T2','Radarr Remux T3','Radarr UHD Bluray T1','Radarr UHD Bluray T2','Radarr UHD Bluray T3','Radarr HD Bluray T1','Radarr HD Bluray T2','Radarr HD Bluray T3','Radarr Web T1','Web T1','Radarr Web T2','Radarr Web T3','LQ (Radarr)','LQ (Release Title) (Radarr)'), (streams)) : []

/*#Sonarr*/ /* Choice */ queryType=='series' ? resolution(regexMatched(streams,'Sonarr Remux T1','Sonarr Remux T2','Sonarr HD Bluray T1','Sonarr HD Bluray T2','Sonarr Web T1','Sonarr Web T2','Sonarr Web T3','Web Scene','Web T1'), '1080p', '2160p') : []

/*#Sonarr*/ /* Retail */ queryType=='series' ? negate(regexMatched(streams,'Sonarr Web T1','Web T1','Sonarr Web T2','Sonarr Web T3','Web Scene','LQ (Sonarr)','LQ (Release Title) (Sonarr)','Webx265', 'Webx264'), resolution(quality(regexMatched(streams, 'ABEMA', 'ADN', 'AMZN', 'ATV', 'ATVP', 'BCORE', 'CR', 'DSNP', 'FUNi', 'HBO', 'HMAX', 'iT', 'MAX', 'Hulu', 'PLAY', 'MA', 'NF', 'PMTP', 'PCOK', 'SHO', 'SYFY', 'VRV'), 'WEB-DL'), '1080p', '2160p')) : []

/*#Sonarr*/ /* MID */ queryType=='series' ? negate(regexMatched(streams,'Sonarr Remux T1','Sonarr Remux T2','Sonarr HD Bluray T1','Sonarr HD Bluray T2','Sonarr Web T1','Web T1','Sonarr Web T2','Sonarr Web T3','Web Scene','LQ (Sonarr)','LQ (Release Title) (Sonarr)'), (streams)) : []

/*#Anime*/ /* Choice */ queryType=='anime.movie' ? resolution(regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T1','Radarr Remux T2','Radarr Remux T3','Anime BD T1','Anime BD T2','Anime BD T3','Anime BD T4','Anime BD T5','Anime BD T6','Anime BD T7','Anime BD T8','Anime Web T1','Anime Web T2','Anime Web T3','Anime Web T4','Anime Web T5','Anime Web T6'), '1080p', '2160p') : []

/*#Anime*/ /* Choice */ queryType=='anime.series' ? resolution(regexMatched(streams,'Sonarr Remux T1','Sonarr Remux T2','Anime BD T1','Anime BD T2','Anime BD T3','Anime BD T4','Anime BD T5','Anime BD T6','Anime BD T7','Anime BD T8','Anime Web T1','Anime Web T2','Anime Web T3','Anime Web T4','Anime Web T5','Anime Web T6'), '1080p', '2160p') : []

/*#Anime*/ /* Retail */ isAnime ? negate(regexMatched(streams,'Anime Web T1','Anime Web T2','Anime Web T3','Anime Web T4','Anime Web T5','Anime Web T6','Anime LQ Groups','Webx265', 'Webx264'), resolution(quality(regexMatched(streams, 'ABEMA', 'ADN', 'AMZN', 'ATV', 'ATVP', 'BCORE', 'CR', 'DSNP', 'FUNi', 'HBO', 'HMAX', 'iT', 'MAX', 'Hulu', 'PLAY', 'MA', 'NF', 'PMTP', 'PCOK', 'SHO', 'SYFY', 'VRV'), 'WEB-DL'), '1080p', '2160p')) : []

/*#Anime*/ /* MID */ queryType=='anime.movie' ? negate(regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T1','Radarr Remux T2','Radarr Remux T3','Anime BD T1','Anime BD T2','Anime BD T3','Anime BD T4','Anime BD T5','Anime BD T6','Anime BD T7','Anime BD T8','Anime Web T1','Anime Web T2','Anime Web T3','Anime Web T4','Anime Web T5','Anime Web T6','Anime LQ Groups'), (streams)) : []

/*#Anime*/ /* MID */ queryType=='anime.series' ? negate(regexMatched(streams,'Sonarr Remux T1','Sonarr Remux T2','Anime BD T1','Anime BD T2','Anime BD T3','Anime BD T4','Anime BD T5','Anime BD T6','Anime BD T7','Anime BD T8','Anime Web T1','Anime Web T2','Anime Web T3','Anime Web T4','Anime Web T5','Anime Web T6','Anime LQ Groups'), (streams)) : []

/* BluRay */ negate(regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T1','Radarr Remux T2','Radarr Remux T3','Radarr UHD Bluray T1','Radarr UHD Bluray T2','Radarr UHD Bluray T3','Radarr HD Bluray T1','Radarr HD Bluray T2','Radarr HD Bluray T3','Sonarr Remux T1','Sonarr Remux T2','Sonarr HD Bluray T1','Sonarr HD Bluray T2','Anime BD T1','Anime BD T2','Anime BD T3','Anime BD T4','Anime BD T5','Anime BD T6','Anime BD T7','Anime BD T8','LQ (Radarr)','LQ (Release Title) (Radarr)','LQ (Sonarr)','LQ (Release Title) (Sonarr)','Anime LQ Groups'), quality(streams, 'BluRay', 'BluRay REMUX'))
/*#Retail Tier 1: The Gold Standard */ negate(regexMatched(streams,'Webx265'), quality(regexMatched(streams, 'BCORE'), 'WEB-DL'))
/* animedubs */ isAnime and originalLanguage != 'English' ? language(streams, 'Dubbed', 'Dual Audio') : []
/* regdubs */ (queryType == 'movie' or queryType == 'series') and originalLanguage != 'English' ? language(streams, 'Dubbed', 'Dual Audio') : []
/*#TOGGLE*//* season-pack */ (queryType == 'series' or queryType == 'anime.series') and ongoingSeason ? [] : negate(seasonPack(streams, 'onlySeasons'), seasonPack(streams, 'seasonPack'))

/* WEBRip */ negate(regexMatched(streams, 'Radarr Web T1', 'Radarr Web T2', 'Radarr Web T3', 'Web T1', 'Sonarr Web T1', 'Sonarr Web T2', 'Sonarr Web T3', 'Web Scene', 'Anime Web T1', 'Anime Web T2', 'Anime Web T3', 'Anime Web T4', 'Anime Web T5', 'Anime Web T6', 'AMZN', 'ATV', 'ATVP', 'BCORE', 'CR', 'DSNP', 'FUNi', 'HBO', 'HMAX', 'iT', 'MAX', 'MA', 'NF'), quality(streams, 'WEBRip'))

/* HDTV */ negate(regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T1','Radarr Remux T2','Radarr Remux T3','Radarr UHD Bluray T1','Radarr UHD Bluray T2','Radarr UHD Bluray T3','Radarr HD Bluray T1','Radarr HD Bluray T2','Radarr HD Bluray T3','Radarr Web T1','Web T1','Radarr Web T2','Radarr Web T3','Sonarr Remux T1','Sonarr Remux T2','Sonarr HD Bluray T1','Sonarr HD Bluray T2','Sonarr Web T1','Sonarr Web T2','Sonarr Web T3','Web Scene','Anime BD T1','Anime BD T2','Anime BD T3','Anime Web T1','Anime Web T2','Anime Web T3'),quality(streams, 'HDTV'))
/* LQ Anime */ isAnime ? regexMatched(streams, 'Anime LQ Groups') : []

/* No-Encode */ negate(merge(regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T1','Radarr Remux T2','Radarr Remux T3','Radarr UHD Bluray T1','Radarr UHD Bluray T2','Radarr UHD Bluray T3','Radarr HD Bluray T1','Radarr HD Bluray T2','Radarr HD Bluray T3','Radarr Web T1','Web T1','Radarr Web T2','Radarr Web T3','Sonarr Remux T1','Sonarr Remux T2','Sonarr HD Bluray T1','Sonarr HD Bluray T2','Sonarr Web T1','Sonarr Web T2','Sonarr Web T3','Web Scene','Anime BD T1','Anime BD T2','Anime BD T3','Anime Web T1','Anime Web T2','Anime Web T3'), quality(streams, 'BluRay REMUX')), encode(streams, 'Unknown'))

/* Bad Source */ negate(regexMatched(streams,'Radarr Remux T1','Radarr Remux T2','Radarr Remux T3','Radarr UHD Bluray T1','Radarr UHD Bluray T2','Radarr UHD Bluray T3','Radarr HD Bluray T1','Radarr HD Bluray T2','Radarr HD Bluray T3','Radarr Web T1','Web T1','Radarr Web T2','Radarr Web T3','Sonarr Remux T1','Sonarr Remux T2','Sonarr HD Bluray T1','Sonarr HD Bluray T2','Sonarr Web T1','Sonarr Web T2','Sonarr Web T3','Web Scene','Anime BD T1','Anime BD T2','Anime BD T3','Anime Web T1','Anime Web T2','Anime Web T3'), quality(streams, 'HDRip', 'HC HD-Rip', 'DVDRip', 'Unknown'))
/*#NUKE*//* Anime Dubs Only */ isAnime and originalLanguage != 'English' ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams, 'Dubs Only')) : []
/*#NUKE*//* Trash */ queryType=='movie' ? regexMatched(streams, 'Extras (Radarr)', 'Generated Dynamic HDR', 'Sing-Along Versions', 'Black and White Editions') : []
/*Bad Dual*/ queryType=='movie' ? regexMatched(streams, 'Radarr Bad Dual Groups') : []
/*Bad Dual*/ queryType=='series' ? regexMatched(streams, 'Sonarr Bad Dual Groups') : []

/*x26x*/ negate(regexMatched(streams, 'Radarr Web T1', 'Radarr Web T2', 'Radarr Web T3', 'Web T1', 'Sonarr Web T1', 'Sonarr Web T2', 'Sonarr Web T3', 'Web Scene', 'Anime Web T1', 'Anime Web T2', 'Anime Web T3', 'Anime Web T4', 'Anime Web T5', 'Anime Web T6'), resolution(regexMatched(streams, 'Webx265', 'Webx264'), '1080p'))
